data.description: This web application offers a user-friendly platform for creating and managing websites, empowering users to build their online presence effortlessly.

class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 mb-24"><div><h1 class="text-5xl mb-8">About</h1><div class="space-y-6 text-lg leading-relaxed"><p class="font-bold">Intentional design, meaningful experiences.</p><p>I'm Eugene, a UI/UX designer and front-end developer based in Kenya. I design digital experiences that are clear, intentional, and easy to use.</p><p>My work lives at the intersection of design and development, where structure, typography, and interaction come together to create thoughtful products. I'm particularly interested in systems thinking and the kind of simplicity that comes from careful constraints.</p></div></div><div class="h-[500px]"><img src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1767130298927-2df12c33e5d6?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3Nzg4Nzd8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwxfHxjcmVhdGl2ZSUyMHN0dWRpbyUyMHNldHVwfGVufDF8fHx8MTc3MzYzNTQxOXww&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080&utm_source=figma&utm_medium=referral" alt="About" class="w-full h-full object-cover"></div></div><div class="mb-24"><h2 class="text-3xl mb-12">Experience</h2><div class="space-y-12"><div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 pb-12 border-b border-gray-300"><div class="text-gray-600">2025 - Present</div><div class="md:col-span-3"><h3 class="text-xl mb-2">Product Designer</h3><p class="text-lg text-gray-700 mb-3">1 Year Experience</p><p class="text-gray-600">Designing user-centered digital products with a focus on functionality, clarity, and accessibility. Working across web and mobile platforms to create intuitive experiences.</p></div></div></div></div><div><h2 class="text-3xl mb-12">What I Do</h2><div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8"><div class="p-6 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors"><h3 class="text-xl mb-3">Web Design</h3><p class="opacity-80">Creating beautiful, functional websites that deliver exceptional user experiences.</p></div><div class="p-6 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors"><h3 class="text-xl mb-3">Brand Identity</h3><p class="opacity-80">Developing cohesive visual identities that communicate brand values effectively.</p></div><div class="p-6 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors"><h3 class="text-xl mb-3">Development</h3><p class="opacity-80">Building robust, scalable web applications using modern technologies.</p></div><div class="p-6 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors"><h3 class="text-xl mb-3">UI/UX Design</h3><p class="opacity-80">Designing intuitive interfaces based on user research and best practices.</p></div><div class="p-6 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors"><h3 class="text-xl mb-3">Design Systems</h3><p class="opacity-80">Creating comprehensive design systems that ensure consistency and efficiency.</p></div><div class="p-6 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors"><h3 class="text-xl mb-3">Consultation</h3><p class="opacity-80">Providing strategic guidance on design, development, and digital transformation.</p></div></div></div></div></main></div></div></div></div></div>
